info.title: Snipcart API
info.description: Snipcart is a developer-first shopping cart platform. The REST API allows you to manage orders, products, customers, discounts, refunds, and notifications.

get.description: Retrieve all completed orders with optional filters.
Retrieve a single order including items, promo codes, and taxes.

put.description: Update the status, tracking info, or metadata of a specific order.

get.description: Return the list of digital goods attached to an order.
Get all notifications for a specific order.

post.description: Add a notification to an order. Can optionally send email to customer.

get.description: Get all refunds for a specific order.

post.description: Issue a refund for a specific order.

get.description: Get details of a specific refund on an order.
Retrieve a list of all products.

post.description: Fetches a URL and imports product definitions found on the page.

fetchUrl.description: URL where product details are defined

get.description: Retrieve a product by its Snipcart ID or user-defined ID.

put.description: Update inventory-related attributes of a product.

delete.description: Archives the product. Archived products are restored if added to a cart again.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all customers.
Retrieve a specific customer by ID.
Retrieve all orders for a specific customer.

delete.description: Delete a discount. Cannot delete discounts used in completed orders.

BasicAuth.description: Use your secret API key as the username with an empty password.
